assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and a Python or TypeScript LLM app, or will use the companion notebook.
No Arize AX account, tracing project, Space ID, or API key exist yet.
The app is not yet instrumented for Arize AX.

developer_goal: Create an Arize AX account and tracing project, instrument an LLM app, and see the first request trace in the project.

first_success.outcome: A request through the instrumented app produces a trace visible in the selected Arize AX project.
first_success.observable_signal: The AX project lists one trace per handled request; opening one displays the span tree with model, prompt, response, latency, and token counts.

route_selection.surface: Arize AX self-service web onboarding plus Get Started tracing guide
route_selection.rule: Select the shortest complete account-to-first-trace route only after signup fields, instrumentation method, and LLM stack are fixed.

candidates.name: New Tracing Project + Instrument Manually with OpenAI Python
candidates.reason: Documented code path, but AX signup fields and whether Agent Setup is shorter remain unresolved.

candidates.name: New Tracing Project + Arize Skills agent instrumentation
candidates.reason: Default Agent Setup / Skills path is a different interaction surface with its own CLI and editor steps.

candidates.name: Manual instrumentation for Anthropic, LangChain, or other integrations
candidates.reason: Thirty-plus integrations change packages and instrumentors without a single required default beyond the OpenAI example.

required_path.action: Sign up for a free Arize AX account and sign in.

required_fields.label: AX signup and authentication inputs
required_fields.notes: Docs require a free AX account but do not publish the signup form fields.

required_path.observable_result: The developer is authenticated in Arize AX.

required_path.action: Create a tracing project from Projects, New Tracing Project, and copy Space ID plus API key.
required_path.observable_result: Project credentials required by register() are available.

required_path.action: Install arize-otel, the LLM provider SDK, and the matching OpenInference instrumentor for the selected stack.
required_path.observable_result: Tracing packages for the chosen integration are installed.

required_path.action: Register the tracer provider with Space ID, API key, and project name, then invoke the instrumentor before any LLM call.
required_path.observable_result: The app is instrumented to export traces to the AX project.

required_path.action: Run representative requests through the instrumented app and open a trace in the AX project.
required_path.observable_result: At least one trace appears with expandable span details.

prerequisites.description: An LLM application in Python or TypeScript, or the companion Colab notebook.
Credentials for the LLM provider being instrumented.

external_gates.description: A free Arize AX account is required before project credentials exist.
The underlying LLM provider account and key remain external dependencies of the instrumented app.

unavoidable_waits.description: Trace ingestion delay after a request completes is not quantified in the quickstart.

platform_outcomes.description: Arize AX creates Space ID and API key credentials for the tracing project.
AX stores and displays request traces with span trees and token metrics.

excluded.item: Reading later Get Started series parts after first trace
excluded.reason: Part 1 ends when traces are visible in the project.

excluded.item: Manual instrumentation deep dives beyond the selected integration
excluded.reason: Optional once one working instrumentor path is chosen.

uncertainties.question: What exact Arize AX signup fields and New Tracing Project form controls does a fresh user complete?
uncertainties.impact: Unverified account and project fields prevent a verified action and field count from account creation.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-account walkthrough from AX signup through Space ID and API key copy.

uncertainties.question: Is Agent Setup / Arize Skills or Instrument Manually the lexicographically shortest required route, and which LLM instrumentor is canonical?
uncertainties.impact: These choices change interfaces, packages, and whether an AI coding agent is required.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: An explicit route selection between Skills and Code plus one named integration for first success.
